name: WP-W1-spine: carve session-exchange into router/spine/judge + engine scaffolding
description: W1 (structural foundation) — carve session-exchange.ts into router / spine / judge slices (F-003) and scaffold the policy engine + router + safety/judge so W2/W3 obligations can be satisfied by construction on it. One architectural cut under one ADR triple (MMT-ADR-0013/0014/0016). Per-domain enforcement that rides on the spine is out of scope (W2/W3).
acceptanceCriteria: session-exchange.ts decomposed into the three slices; engine/router/judge spine exists and is unit-exercised; structured envelope (llmResponseEnvelopeSchema) parse path present. Findings: F-003 + build-item (engine scaffold). Source of truth: _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 WP-W1-spine (commit 23d0c01ad)
riskImpact: M / risky — the request-handling spine; root of by-construction satisfaction for W2/W3.
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-W1-spine)
Transcribed from the ratified Phase-O master plan _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 → "WP-W1-spine" detail block @ commit 23d0c01ad (eduagent-build) — the frozen source of truth. Children are absorbed provenance (ZDX-ADR-0001).
Bundle rationale
F-003 is the carve that produces the router/spine/judge slices; the scaffolding fills those exact slices — one architectural cut under one ADR triple (MMT-ADR-0013/0014/0016).
Strategy
Carve session-exchange.ts into router / spine / judge slices; scaffold the policy engine + router + safety/judge so W2/W3 obligations can be satisfied by construction on it.
Scope
In: F-003 + engine/router/judge scaffold. Out: the per-domain enforcement that rides on the spine (W2/W3).
Findings table
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
session-exchange.ts decomposed into the three slices.
Engine/router/judge spine exists and is unit-exercised.
Structured envelope (llmResponseEnvelopeSchema) parse path present.
Risk & blast radius
M / risky — the request-handling spine; root of by-construction satisfaction for W2/W3. Depends on WP-W1-schema (WI-570).
